summary: No wireframe exists for /admin/spend (route-without-wireframe, as flagged in BRIEF.json). Visual conformance (§3.2.1) could only be assessed against product/security sense, not a design spec.
reproduction: 1. Search design/screens/ for any admin-spend wireframe file.
2. Confirm BRIEF.json screen.wireframe_files is an empty array and coverage_gap = 'route-without-wireframe'.
expected: A wireframe file to compare the rendered /admin/spend screen against.
observed: No wireframe file exists anywhere in the repo for this route; brief confirms this is a known, pre-flagged coverage gap.
